seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Our privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

children.text: PT Ahli Web Internasional ("AhliWeb", "we") collects information you provide directly to us, such as name, email address, phone number, and business information when you use our services or contact us.
The information we collect is used to:
Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Communicate with you about services, updates, and offers
Process transactions and send related information
Protect the security and integrity of our platform
We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as necessary to provide services or as required by law.

We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, improper use, or unintended disclosure. However, no method of data transmission over the internet is entirely secure.
Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve user experience. You can control cookie usage through your browser settings.
We retain your information as long as necessary to provide services and meet legal obligations. When no longer needed, data will be securely deleted.
You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at solutions@ahliweb.com.
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified to you via email or notice on our website.
If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:

seo.title: Information Security Management System Policy
seo.description: AhliWeb's ISMS policy establishes the framework for protecting information security.

children.text: PT Ahli Web Internasional's Information Security Management System (ISMS) Policy establishes the framework for protecting the security of information and digital assets of the company and its customers.
PT Ahli Web Internasional commits to:
Protecting the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information
Complying with applicable information security requirements
Continuously improving the information security management system
Building a security culture throughout the organization
This policy applies to all information processed, stored, or transmitted by AhliWeb, including:
All employees, contractors, and partners with access to AhliWeb systems
AhliWeb applies the following information security principles:
Information is only accessible by authorized parties
Information accuracy is maintained and not modified without authorization
Systems and information are available when needed by authorized users
Identity of parties accessing systems can be verified
Actions cannot be denied by the actor
AhliWeb conducts periodic risk assessments to identify, analyze, and evaluate information security risks. Identified risks are addressed through appropriate security controls.
Access to systems and information is managed based on the principle of least privilege. Each user is only granted the access necessary to perform their duties.
Physical infrastructure is housed in high-security data center facilities with physical access controls, cooling systems, and disaster protection.
AhliWeb has security incident handling procedures covering:
Root cause analysis and corrective actions
AhliWeb complies with applicable information security regulations and standards, including Indonesia's Personal Data Protection Law (UU PDP) and international standard ISO/IEC 27001.
All AhliWeb personnel receive periodic information security training to ensure understanding and compliance with this policy.
This ISMS policy is reviewed and updated periodically, at least annually, or when significant changes occur in the business environment or security threats.

seo.title: Kebijakan Sistem Manajemen Keamanan Informasi
seo.description: Kebijakan SMKI AhliWeb menetapkan kerangka kerja perlindungan keamanan informasi.

children.text: Kebijakan Sistem Manajemen Keamanan Informasi (SMKI) PT Ahli Web Internasional menetapkan kerangka kerja untuk melindungi keamanan informasi dan aset digital perusahaan serta pelanggan.
PT Ahli Web Internasional berkomitmen untuk:
Melindungi kerahasiaan, integritas, dan ketersediaan informasi
Mematuhi persyaratan keamanan informasi yang berlaku
Terus meningkatkan sistem manajemen keamanan informasi
Membangun budaya keamanan di seluruh organisasi
Kebijakan ini berlaku untuk semua informasi yang diproses, disimpan, atau ditransmisikan oleh AhliWeb, termasuk:
Seluruh karyawan, kontraktor, dan mitra yang memiliki akses ke sistem AhliWeb
AhliWeb menerapkan prinsip-prinsip keamanan informasi berikut:
Informasi hanya dapat diakses oleh pihak yang berwenang
Informasi dijaga ketepatannya dan tidak dimodifikasi secara tidak sah
Sistem dan informasi tersedia ketika dibutuhkan oleh pengguna yang berwenang
Identitas pihak yang mengakses sistem dapat diverifikasi
Tindakan tidak dapat disangkal oleh pelakunya

AhliWeb melakukan penilaian risiko secara berkala untuk mengidentifikasi, menganalisis, dan mengevaluasi risiko keamanan informasi. Risiko yang teridentifikasi ditangani melalui penerapan kontrol keamanan yang tepat.
Akses ke sistem dan informasi dikelola berdasarkan prinsip hak akses minimal (least privilege). Setiap pengguna hanya diberikan akses yang diperlukan untuk menjalankan tugasnya.
Infrastruktur fisik ditempatkan di fasilitas data center berstandar keamanan tinggi dengan kontrol akses fisik, sistem pendingin, dan perlindungan dari bencana.
AhliWeb memiliki prosedur penanganan insiden keamanan yang mencakup:
AhliWeb mematuhi regulasi dan standar keamanan informasi yang berlaku, termasuk Undang-Undang Perlindungan Data Pribadi Indonesia (UU PDP) dan standar internasional ISO/IEC 27001.
Seluruh personel AhliWeb menerima pelatihan keamanan informasi secara berkala untuk memastikan pemahaman dan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan ini.
Kebijakan SMKI ini ditinjau dan diperbarui secara berkala, minimal setahun sekali, atau ketika terjadi perubahan signifikan dalam lingkungan bisnis atau ancaman keamanan.

children.text: Professional Business Consulting & OKR Management Services

Success in digital transformation is not just about adopting new technology tools; it is about aligning business vision, organizational structure, and team execution measurably. AhliWeb delivers comprehensive business consulting services, ranging from digital organizational blueprinting to performance training using the OKR (Objectives and Key Results) methodology.

children.text: Jasa Konsultasi Bisnis Profesional & Manajemen OKR

Sukses dalam transformasi digital bukan hanya tentang adopsi alat teknologi baru, melainkan tentang menyelaraskan visi bisnis, struktur organisasi, dan eksekusi tim secara terukur. AhliWeb menghadirkan layanan konsultasi bisnis komprehensif, mulai dari penyusunan cetak biru digital organisasi hingga pelatihan kinerja menggunakan metodologi OKR (Objectives and Key Results).
: Kerangka kerja strategis untuk transformasi digital terpadu yang menyelaraskan prinsip syariah, sumber daya manusia, proses bisnis, dan teknologi.
: Riset pasar mendalam dan analisis kompetitor berbasis data sekunder terverifikasi untuk menemukan celah pasar yang potensial.
: Pelatihan interaktif dan pendampingan implementasi OKR untuk merumuskan tujuan perusahaan serta menetapkan indikator keberhasilan tim yang terukur.
: Audit dan penyusunan ulang alur kerja operasional bisnis untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan mengurangi pemborosan melalui lean management.
: Analisis SWOT spasial, asesmen maturitas digital, wawancara pemangku kepentingan

: KPI matrix, RACI responsibility charts, balanced scorecard
